gist.headline: Pruning the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Did a little weeding in the community greenhouse! We've updated some app ownership credits and removed a few dead links to keep the showcase fresh.
gist.summary: Cleaned up the community app directory by correcting ownership credits and removing dead links.
gist.impact: The app showcase is now more accurate and free of broken links.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about cleaning up the app directory (APPS.md, GREENHOUSE.md). Metaphor: weeding a garden, pruning plants in a greenhouse. Characters: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature eating dead weeds/code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, pulling a dead pixelated weed from a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot in a digital greenhouse. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the discarded weeds. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
